title: feat: add p0 admin attempt plan review surface
goal: Add read-only admin review surface for local/internal reaction dispatch attempt plans without external execution.

risks.risk: Accidental external dispatch from a review endpoint.
risks.mitigation: GET routes only project existing metadata and tests assert no reaction, overlay, external outbox, adapter, IRIS Core, VOXWEAVE, TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, or WebSocket execution.

risks.risk: Raw support message, payload, wallet, secret, private URL, adapter URL, or webhook URL exposure.
risks.mitigation: The response projection returns hashes, statuses, and reason codes only; tests assert forbidden raw fields and strings are absent.

risks.risk: Review endpoint mutates support, outbox, lease, or attempt plan state.
risks.mitigation: The new handlers do not call repository write methods or audit writes; tests compare stored support, outbox, lease, attempt plan, audit, reaction, overlay, and outbox counts before and after reads.

risks.risk: Committed local evidence must be refreshed with PR current-head GitHub run and artifact IDs.
risks.mitigation: Refresh PR evidence after PR creation, then confirm same-head CI, contracts, quality-gate, and safe artifact.
